epigraph.quote: Bantam Chickens, bees & piglets in the nave of Ely Cathedral for a lovely harvest service.

moments.quote: Simon & Eve drove across to Ely Station to pick up Thomas for Robert Upex's 50 birthday party at Chippenham.
A super party. We slept on the drive & had breakfast in the sunshine outside.
Bantam Chickens, bees & piglets in the nave of Ely Cathedral for a lovely harvest service.
